vllm.title: [Model][Misc] Add e5-mistral-7b-instruct and Embedding API
vllm.author: CatherineSue
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Key Features of This Pull Request
This PR adds the e5-mistral-7b-instruct model and enables an E2E embedding vector generation.
There are a few open PRs that add support for embedding models. Our PR uniquely addresses the following key issues:
Integration of the OpenAI Server Front End

vllm.title: [Model] Add support for IBM Granite Code models
vllm.author: yikangshen
vllm.bodyExcerpt: To support IBM Granite Code 3B and 8B models, this PR adds MLP bias and tie word embedding support to the llama architecture.
